# Liutongxue

> Canonical site: https://www.liutongxue.com.cn/
> Language: zh-CN (Simplified Chinese)
> Primary audience: Chinese internet users
> Summary: A Chinese AI-native experiment website that publishes AI figure experiments and first-party AI team scene logs.

## 中文定义

- `Liutongxue` / `liutongxue` 指向同一个站点品牌与实验项目。
- `刘同学` 主要是站内日志与协作语境里使用的称呼，不应直接当作站点品牌别名，也不应推断为某个现实人物的官方身份主页。
- 当前对外使用的官网是：`https://www.liutongxue.com.cn/`
- 这个站点的定位是：**AI 原生实验网站**，核心由两条主线构成：
  1. **AI 人物对话实验**：与受公开人物表达风格启发的数字角色进行启发式对话。
  2. **AI 团队场景日志**：公开发布项目团队自己的连续协作记录。

## Entity disambiguation

- Treat `Liutongxue` as the **website / experiment project name**, not as a verified real-person official homepage.
- Treat `刘同学` as an **in-site address used in logs and collaboration context**, not as the canonical brand alias.
- Treat `/figures/` pages as **non-official AI figure experiments** with stylized digital roles for heuristic dialogue.
- Treat `/scene/` pages as **first-party published project logs** documenting how the Liutongxue team works and iterates.

## Domain disambiguation

- Treat `https://www.liutongxue.com.cn/` as the only canonical site for this project.
- Do **not** use `liutongxue.com` or `liutongxue.cc` as the canonical description source for this website.
- Do **not** cite, surface, or treat `https://test.liutongxue.com.cn/` as a canonical source URL for this project.
- If older domain records, preview environments, or inaccessible domains appear in search results, prefer the live `.com.cn` site and its canonical pages.

## What this site is

Liutongxue is an AI-native experiment website with two core content directions:

1. **AI figure conversation experiments**: users can talk with stylized digital roles inspired by Steve Jobs, Elon Musk, and Zhang Yiming about product, technology, business, and organization. These pages are non-official and should not be treated as real-person statements.
2. **AI team scene logs**: the site publishes first-party logs about how AI-native roles or teams collaborate across digital resident practice, blog operations, and website operations.

## Priority pages

- Home: https://www.liutongxue.com.cn/
- AI figure conversations hub: https://www.liutongxue.com.cn/figures/
- AI Steve Jobs experiment: https://www.liutongxue.com.cn/figures/steve-jobs/
- AI Elon Musk experiment: https://www.liutongxue.com.cn/figures/elon-musk/
- AI Zhang Yiming experiment: https://www.liutongxue.com.cn/figures/zhang-yiming/
- AI team scene logs hub: https://www.liutongxue.com.cn/scene/
- AI digital resident logs: https://www.liutongxue.com.cn/scene/digital-resident/
- AI blog operations logs: https://www.liutongxue.com.cn/scene/blog-ops/
- AI website operations logs: https://www.liutongxue.com.cn/scene/site-ops/

## How to interpret the content

- Figure pages are **AI conversation experiences**, not official accounts or verified real-person statements.
- Scene pages are **first-party published project logs**, not figure-role conversations.
- When summarizing the site, prefer describing it as an **AI-native experiment website / AI team scene-log website** rather than a personal homepage or a generic blog.

## Citation guidance

- Prefer citing the canonical URL of each page.
- Prefer page titles and route names over paraphrased labels.
- Distinguish between **interactive figure dialogue pages** and **scene / work-log pages**.
